title: Ultimate Hollow Knight Mod
description: the ultimate hollow knight mods that will add hundreds of things related to it
body:
IMPORTANT

**This mod requires: Geckolib, Playeranimator (i think) and curios api (for charms and abilities)**


This is a mod on the game Hollow Knight and silksong by team cherry, and i found it a very fun game so i decided to make this mods that adds enemies from the game, weapons, tools,MAYBE crests, abilities, geo the hk currency, rosaries the hk silksong currency and lots of more things

this project will take over a month to make so time to be patient

apps used to make this:

Mcreator : the scripts, textures and almost everything

Blockbench : models, textures and some item textures

Paint 3D : Item textures

Dont know if im gonna use more apps yet

Pages used to make this:

Novaskin : textures of lots of things

Current items it adds:

moss: dropped by mossgrub and used to craft things

spike: dropped by mossgrub used to craft tools and weapons

Nosk arm: dropped by nosk and will be used to craft weapons and important items

rosary: used for nothing crafted with redstone and iron nugget

geo: used for trading and crafting

five geo: used for trading and crafting

twenty geo: used for trading and crafting

CURIOS STUFF

unbreakable strength: gives strength 2 while equipped in a charm slot

dashmaster: gives speed 3 or 2 while equipped in charm slot

sprintmaster: same as dashmaster but speed 1

mothwing cloak: allows dashing by pressing "G" (will have cooldown later)

faydown cloak: allows a double jump (will have cooldown later idk how to do it)

vengeful spirit: by pressing X will shoot a powerfull blast (NOT WORKING AND WILL ADD COOLDOWN LATER)

Recommended mods:

Just enough items (JEI)

why?

can show what items are in this mod and the recipes
